'''Froera''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who, along with her mother [[Attiera]], was part of the [[Myyydril]] tribe shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Froera appeared as a non-player character in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{C|Cut content}}
